content:
Dear Members of the Dataverse Community,

I’m writing to share a staff transition within our organization, IQSS, and the Dataverse team.

After many years of dedicated service at IQSS, Gustavo Durand will be leaving his role as Senior Software Architect & Technical Lead. Gustavo has been a valued member of our community for 19 years and has made important contributions to our work and to the Dataverse Project. We are grateful for Gustavo’s commitment, expertise, and collegiality over nearly two decades, and we wish him all the best in his next chapter.

As we navigate this transition, we remain firmly committed to the ongoing development, support, and maintenance of Dataverse.

Sincerely,

Ceilyn
--
Interim Director of Data Science and Product Research
Institute for Quantitative Social Sciences (IQSS)
Harvard University
Cambridge, MA 02138
